response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff Engineer with a strong background in high-throughput distributed systems (handling millions of requests per second) and recent, highly relevant exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling. While he lacks the required Python experience, his deep expertise in TypeScript, systems architecture, and agentic workflows makes him a compelling candidate who can quickly adapt to the technical stack.
strengths: Direct, hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Proven ability to design high-throughput systems, having handled millions of HTTP requests per second.
Strong ownership and systems-thinking mindset, demonstrated by his Staff-level roles and founding an open-source Geo-Data platform.
concerns: Lacks professional experience with Python, which is listed as a strict must-have for the role.
His high-throughput systems experience was primarily built using a niche language (Dlang) rather than mainstream enterprise stacks.
His current role involving AI-agent infrastructure is very recent, potentially limiting the long-term depth of his production exposure in this specific area.
